chief_complaint: A young woman presents with symptoms of thyroid storm and chest pain.
history: The patient developed spontaneous coronary artery dissection (SCAD) during a thyroid storm (TS). SCAD is a rare cause of acute coronary syndromes and is life-threatening. The etiology of SCAD appears to be poorly understood.
exam: No specific physical examination findings are reported.
labs: High levels of circulating thyroid hormones and elevated troponin are noted.
correct_diagnosis: Spontaneous coronary artery dissection (SCAD) in the context of thyroid storm
differentials: Spontaneous coronary artery dissection (SCAD) in the context of thyroid storm
correct_ranking: Spontaneous coronary artery dissection (SCAD) in the context of thyroid storm
